## Release

- Version:
- Game build:

## Checklist

- [ ] `manifest.json` updated
- [ ] workspace validation passes
- [ ] deployed cleanly
- [ ] in-game smoke test passes
- [ ] package created under `outputs/releases`
- [ ] Git tag or GitHub release created
